creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
You are right, please commit it.
 
 Thank you.
 
 wen
 
 2011/10/15 TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@freebsd.org>:
 >
 >>Submitter-Id: =C2=A0current-users
 >>Originator: =C2=A0 =C2=A0TAKATSU Tomonari
 >>Organization: =C2=A0none (private)
 >>Confidential: =C2=A0no
 >>Synopsis: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0[PATCH] Mk/bsd.cran.mk: Fix path to make fe=
 tchable
 >>Severity: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0non-critical
 >>Priority: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0low
 >>Category: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0ports
 >>Class: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 change-request
 >>Release: =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 FreeBSD 8.2-RELEASE-p3 amd64
 >>Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD photon.local.lan 8.2-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 8.2-RELEASE-p3 #0=
 : Tue Sep 27 18:45:57 UTC 2011
 >>Description:
 > - Fix path to make fetchable
 >
 >>How-To-Repeat:
 > # pwd
 > /usr/ports/textproc/R-cran-xtable
 > # make distclean
 > =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Cleaning for R-cran-xtable-1.6.0
 > =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Deleting distfiles for R-cran-xtable-1.6.0
 > # make fetch
 > =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
 > =3D> xtable_1.6-0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
 > =3D> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.ctex.org/mirrors/CRAN/xtable_1.6-0.ta=
 r.gz
 > fetch: http://ftp.ctex.org/mirrors/CRAN/xtable_1.6-0.tar.gz: Not Found
 > =3D> Attempting to fetch http://cran.rakanu.com/src/contrib/xtable_1.6-0.=
 tar.gz
 > xtable_1.6-0.tar.gz =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=
 =A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 100% of =C2=A0227 kB =C2=A0 96 kBps
 >
 >>Fix:
 > Index: bsd.cran.mk
 > =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
 =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
 =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D
 > RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/Mk/bsd.cran.mk,v
 > retrieving revision 1.8
 > diff -u -r1.8 bsd.cran.mk
 > --- bsd.cran.mk 29 Sep 2011 06:58:39 -0000 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A01.8
 > +++ bsd.cran.mk 15 Oct 2011 11:45:38 -0000
 > @@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 > =C2=A0CRAN_Include_MAINTAINER=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 wen@FreeBSD.org
 >
 > =C2=A0.if defined(USE_R_MOD)
 > -MASTER_CRAN_SITES+=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://ftp.ctex.org/mirrors/CRAN/ \
 > +MASTER_CRAN_SITES+=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://ftp.ctex.org/mirrors/CRAN/src/=
 contrib/ \
 > =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=
 =A0 =C2=A0http://cran.rakanu.com/src/contrib/ \
 > =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=
 =A0 =C2=A0http://cran.ms.unimelb.edu.au/src/contrib/ \
 > =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=
 =A0 =C2=A0http://mirror.its.dal.ca/cran/src/contrib/ \
 >
